overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban commercial district. The player character moves from a covered sidewalk past a convenience store, through an open plaza with holographic advertisements, down a narrow market alley with street vendors, and exits onto a main street with the Data Inc building. Bright sunlight creates strong shadows against the neon-lit cyberpunk architecture.

events.description: passing the entrance of the 25h/7 convenience store

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the overpass structure, approaching the convenience store

notable_agents.action: standing near the 25h/7 store entrance looking at the window

entered.detail: large rectangular billboard with 'HEALTH WARNING' text and graphic
red metal overpass structure with large white '03' markings
row of parked vehicles under the overpass shadow
futuristic convenience store with blue neon signage and glass front

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a red metal overpass structure marked '03', walking along a concrete sidewalk. The 25h/7 convenience store with blue neon trim appears on the right, while parked cars line the left side under the overpass shadow. A health warning billboard is visible in the distance as the camera moves forward past the store entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with holographic advertisements

moving from shadow into bright direct sunlight in the plaza center

agents.ego_description: crossing the open plaza area, navigating between pedestrians and benches

entered.detail: multi-story building with large holographic burger advertisement and red neon trim
concrete seating areas with people sitting and resting
floating digital advertisements above the plaza entrance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a bright sunlit plaza. A large building dominates the left side with massive holographic burger advertisements. Concrete benches line the left where pedestrians sit, while the camera moves through the moderate crowd toward the pedestrian street entrance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian shopping street with commercial storefronts

events.description: entering the narrower pedestrian street with buildings on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking down the commercial pedestrian street, passing by storefronts and vending machines on the right

notable_agents.action: woman in red cap walking ahead while using her phone

entered.detail: prominent yellow architectural overhang on the left building facade
row of commercial shops with glass windows and signage
futuristic automated vending kiosks along the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrower pedestrian street flanked by buildings. On the left, a distinctive yellow architectural overhang provides partial shade, while the right side features continuous storefronts and vending machines. The crowd density remains moderate with pedestrians walking in the same direction, and the plaza building with the burger ad recedes into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market alley with street vendors and graffiti

events.description: entering the darker narrow alley section with market stalls
passing the yellow umbrella market stall on the right

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow alley toward the MaxTac billboard and Data Inc building visible ahead

entered.detail: large red and gold skull mural painted on the right wall
street vendor stalls with goods displayed along the right side
market stall covered by a large yellow umbrella
large holographic billboard displaying 'MaxTac' advertisement with purple and pink graphics

segments.scene_description: The street narrows into an enclosed alley with a prominent skull graffiti mural on the right wall. Market stalls line the right side, including one with a distinctive yellow umbrella. The lighting becomes darker and more shadowed as the camera approaches the large MaxTac holographic billboard at the alley's end, with the Data Inc building entrance becoming visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: main street intersection with Data Inc building

events.description: exiting the narrow alley onto the main street with the Data Inc building
turning right onto the main street sidewalk

agents.ego_description: exiting the alley and turning right to walk along the main street sidewalk next to the Data Inc building

entered.detail: large commercial building with blue and yellow facade and 'DATA INC' neon signage
multi-lane asphalt road with red painted curbs and traffic bollards
tall palm trees lining the main street median

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the alley into a bright main street intersection dominated by the Data Inc building with its distinctive blue and yellow facade. After passing the building entrance, the camera turns right onto the main sidewalk. The MaxTac billboard is left behind as the view opens to the main road with palm trees and urban infrastructure extending into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a shadowed urban underpass through a series of increasingly narrow commercial corridors before emerging into a wide, sunlit main street. It begins under a red metal overpass beside a blue-trimmed convenience store, moving along a concrete sidewalk where deep shadows contrast with a distant health warning billboard. As the camera emerges from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a bright plaza dominated by massive holographic burger advertisements and crowds of pedestrians. The view then shifts into a narrower pedestrian street with a yellow architectural overhang, which gradually tightens into a shadowed alley featuring skull graffiti and market stalls under yellow umbrellas. Finally, the camera passes a MaxTac holographic billboard to emerge into the brilliant light of a main intersection, passing the blue and yellow facade of the Data Inc building before turning toward a road lined with palm trees.
